creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
I just updated my ports tree and attempted to update the "net-im/telepathy-glib" port. The build went into an endless loop and the system ran out of swap space. I rebooted, updated the ports tree again and then tried to build the port. The log file of the build was exceeding 3G when I shut the build down. The following is repeated Ad infinitum:

TelepathyGLib-0.12.gir:42725.1-42725.0: warning: expected end element of `type'


TelepathyGLib-0.12.gir:42725.1-42725.0: error: unexpected end of file


TelepathyGLib-0.12.gir:42725.1-42725.0: warning: expected end element of `type'


TelepathyGLib-0.12.gir:42725.1-42725.0: error: unexpected end of file


TelepathyGLib-0.12.gir:42725.1-42725.0: warning: expected end element of `type'


TelepathyGLib-0.12.gir:42725.1-42725.0: error: unexpected end of file


TelepathyGLib-0.12.gir:42725.1-42725.0: warning: expected end element of `type'
